title: Hebbet Ramakka
subTitle: An illiterate woman's life is turned upside down when she is forced to stand for the district council elections.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Lord Shiva sets Tarakasura's sons and Asura Guru free from captivity, cautioning them about their inevitable downfall in their next confrontation. Will Tarakasura's sons heed this warning seriously?

title: Jithendra
subTitle: Jitendra, an irresponsible man, is a burden on his parents. His life undergoes a major change when he falls in love with a girl.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: As Lord Shiva accedes to Tarakasura's demand and presents him with the Shivastra, Lord Vishnu intervenes by dispelling the spell and restoring balance to the cosmic universe. Will the wedding proceed as scheduled amidst these celestial interventions?

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Lord Shiva and Parvati exchange garlands during the wedding ceremony. Later, Lord Shiva expresses his gratitude to Himavan for offering his daughter's hand in marriage. How will Himavan react to this expression of gratitude?

title: Namma Basava
subTitle: A bountiful and helpful boy falls in love with a musician without knowing the fact that a rich spoilt brat is also planning to woo her.

title: Ninne Preethisuve
subTitle: A soldier dies in a war after he gets engaged to Meghamala. When she learns that his eyes were donated to another man, a sudden turn of events changes her life forever.

title: Solillada Saradara
subTitle: Krishna, a ferry driver, is about to marry Rukmini, the love of his life. However, things take a turn when a landlord's daughter falls for him.

title: Ondagona Baa
subTitle: Raghu comes to his paternal village to attend his grandfather's diamond jubilee function. He finds out that due to his uncle, his family was separated, and tries to fix things.

title: Ugramm
subTitle: Agastya, an automobile mechanic with a dangerous past, takes it upon himself to protect Nithya, a kidnapped girl, from the vengeful son of a ruthless gangster.

title: Aramane
subTitle: A photographer named Arun befriends Rajashekhara, a wealthy but lonely man who has resorted to drinking to quell his pain. Soon, Arun agrees to help him reunite with his estranged family.

title: Aramane

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: As Lord Shiva accedes to Tarakasura's demand and presents him with the Shivastra, Lord Vishnu intervenes by dispelling the spell and restoring balance to the cosmic universe. Will the wedding proceed as scheduled amidst these celestial interventions?

title: Lakshmi Narayanara Prapanchane Bere
subTitle: Lakshmi seeks help from a psychiatrist to cure her husband, Narayana, of his extreme psychological disorder which acts a barrier in their relationship.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Mainadevi becomes displeased with Lord Shiva for bestowing Shivastra upon Tarakasura, despite the joyous occasion of Lord Shiva and Parvati completing their wedding ceremony.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Parvati prepares herself to depart with Lord Shiva after their wedding ceremony. Meanwhile, Mainadevi becomes emotional and bursts into tears as she bids farewell to Parvati. Can Parvati console her before she departs?

title: Ugramm
subTitle: Agastya, an automobile mechanic with a dangerous past, takes it upon himself to protect Nithya, a kidnapped girl, from the vengeful son of a ruthless gangster.

title: Tagaru Palya
subTitle: After a villager secures a marriage alliance with a city boy for his only daughter, he prepares to offer a sacrifice to the gods. However, things go awry during the ceremony.

title: Ayya
subTitle: An upright police officer is up against a conniving group of criminals. So, he devises a series of unconventional methods, in order to put them behind bars.

title: Jaguar
subTitle: Krishna, an orphan medical student, lives a seemingly ordinary life. However, unbeknownst to people, he is a vigilante named Jaguar who pursues a certain group of people in order to kill them.

title: Vedha
subTitle: A father and daughter embark on a killing spree in a bid to seek revenge against those who have wronged them. However, a police officer seeks to put an end to their murders.

title: Garuda
subTitle: Pradeep is a dedicated police officer who deals with criminals swiftly. He soon locks horns with Mahaveer Das, a notorious criminal, and tries to crush his empire.

title: Garuda

title: Toss
subTitle: Toss is a 2017 Indian Kannada romantic comedy film written, directed and co-produced by Dayal Padmanabhan. The film stars Vijay Raghavendra, Sandeep and Ramya Barna in the lead roles.The film, under the banner of D Pictures and Om productions, was launched by Puneeth Rajkumar on 27 January 2012. After being in development for more than 5 years, the film is set to release on 21 July 2017.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: As Parvati journeys towards Kailash alongside Lord Shiva, memories of her past life as Sati flood her mind, evoking a deep sense of nostalgia and reflection. Meanwhile, in the realm of the Asuras, a search ensues for a suitable bride for Tarakasura.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Lord Shiva and Parvati rejoice as the ten Rishis prepare to perform the sacred act of circumambulation around them as a gesture of reverence. However Parvati's joy turns to dismay when Rishi Bhringi declines to pay homage to her, causing her to feel.

title: Vedha
subTitle: A father and daughter embark on a killing spree in a bid to seek revenge against those who have wronged them. However, a police officer seeks to put an end to their murders.

title: Lakshmi Mahalakshmi
subTitle: Chandrappa believes that his daughter, Lakshmi, brings good luck and his second daughter, Anita, brings bad luck.

title: Chikkejamanru
subTitle: A sinister man tries to defame the village landlord and create trouble for the village. However, the landlord is determined to stand tough against all the allegations.

title: Neer Dose
subTitle: A retired government worker, a van driver, a sex worker and the owner of a milk stall lead an odd friendship as they try to navigate through their lives.

title: Ee Bandhana
subTitle: An old couple sacrifices everything, so their children live a happy life. However, they are forced to separate and subjected to ill-treatment and disrespect in their children's homes.

title: Operation Nakshatra
subTitle: Srikanta lives a seemingly happy life with his daughter, Roshni, and his young wife, Smitha. However, several incidents threaten to tear down their facade and reveal their true nature.
